value: Phase 5 (Directory Infrastructure) design decisions: (1) Uniform directory schema on all 18 tools — only pass to SDK where endpoint accepts it, document which tools honor it. Consistent tool surface > inconsistent schema. (2) resolveDirectory() ends at undefined NOT process.cwd() — only send directory when explicitly provided via per-tool param or OPENCODE_DEFAULT_PROJECT. Sending process.cwd() unconditionally silently overrides OpenCode session-level directory tracking.
